title: cirsium × masferreri
intro: Cirsium × masferreri, also known as the Spanish needle thistle, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is a cross between the Cirsium acaule and Cirsium heterophyllum. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and prevent infection. The plant is used to support overall health and well-being, with potential benefits including reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. Cirsium × masferreri can be prepared for medicinal use in various ways, including as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
